## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally (no errors)
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (all tests green)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://conventionalcommits.org) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
- [ ] No unintended runtime file changes (`index.html`, `js/*.js`, `css/`) slipped in
- [ ] `APP_VERSION` in `config.js` bumped if JS or CSS changed
